title: Incredibly Optimized [ NeoForge - Archive ]
description: The Incredibly Optimized [ NeoForge ] modpack will no longer receive updates as of now. This might change in the future but it isn't likely.
body:
# **Banner**
![Incredibly Optimized Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1169b02180ca5b39dd4fbbc73b7708a0c8742308.png)

**Discontinued**
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
The **Incredibly Optimized [ NeoForge ]** modpack will no longer receive updates as of now. This might change in the future but it isn't likely.

**Loader**
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
This is the **NeoForged** version of the **Incredibly Optimized** modpack.
> To get the **Quilt** version of the modpack click [here](https://modrinth.com/project/incredibly-optimized-quilt).

> To get the **Fabric** version of the modpack click [here](https://modrinth.com/project/incredibly-optimized-fabric).

> To get the **Incredibly Enhanced** modpack click [here](https://modrinth.com/modpack/incredibly-enhanced-fabric).

**Mods**
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
The **Incredibly Optimized** contains **50+ mods** that will optimize your Minecraft expierience.

**Features**
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
**Incredibly Optimized** modpack offers:

✔️ Shader support

✔️ Incredible optimization _*2x - 6x FPS_

✔️ Replacement of Optifine features

✔️ Better controls

✔️ & much more!

**Installation**
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
> Download a Minecraft launcher of your choice ([AT Launcher](https://atlauncher.com/downloads), [Prism Launcher](https://prismlauncher.org/download/windows/), [Modrinth App](https://modrinth.com/app))

> Login to the laucher

> Search for the **Incredibly Optimized** modpack

> Click install

> Choose the newest version

> You have succesfully installed it!

**Links**
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

> [Moderon](https://discord.gg/hZfz2vtjAV) - Discord
